C:\Windows\system32\wsl.exe --distribution Ubuntu --exec "/mnt/d/codeSoft/CLion 2024.1/bin/ttyfix" /bin/bash -c "export CLION_IDE=TRUE && export CMAKE_COLOR_DIAGNOSTICS=ON && export JETBRAINS_IDE=TRUE && cd /home/dministrator/hot_reload_tool/cmake-build-debug-wsl && /usr/bin/cmake -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -G 'CodeBlocks - Unix Makefiles' -S /home/dministrator/hot_reload_tool -B /home/dministrator/hot_reload_tool/cmake-build-debug-wsl"
CMake Deprecation Warning:
  Support for "Extra Generators" like

    CodeBlocks

  is deprecated and will be removed from a future version of CMake.  IDEs may
  use the cmake-file-api(7) to view CMake-generated project build trees.
